About Organization

IDBI Bank is a government-owned bank in India. It was established in 1964 and is headquartered in Mumbai. The bank provides a range of financial services, including personal banking, corporate banking, and investment banking.

About the Programme

The IDBI Bank Specialist Officer SO Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity in India. The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for various specialist officer positions in the bank.
